researchResults.title: No one has a good plan for how AI companies should work with the government
researchResults.description: As OpenAI transitions from a wildly successful consumer startup into a piece of national security infrastructure, the company seems unequipped to manage its new responsibilities.

researchResults.title: Users are ditching ChatGPT for Claude — here’s how to make the switch
researchResults.description: Following controversies surrounding ChatGPT, many users are ditching the AI chatbot for Claude instead. Here's how to make the switch.

researchResults.title: Tech workers urge DOD, Congress to withdraw Anthropic label as a supply-chain risk
researchResults.description: Tech workers have signed an open letter urging the Department of Defense to withdraw its designation of Anthropic as a "supply chain risk" and instead to settle the matter quietly.

researchResults.title: NVIDIA Details New A.I. Chips and Autonomous Car Project With Mercedes
NVIDIA Unveils Faster AI Chips Sooner Than Expected
Cursor has reportedly surpassed $2B in annualized revenue
researchResults.description: The four-year-old startup saw its revenue run rate double over the past three months, according to one Bloomberg source.

researchResults.title: ChatGPT uninstalls surged by 295% after DoD deal
researchResults.description: Many consumers ditched ChatGPT's app after news of its DoD deal went live, while Claude's downloads grew.
